title: Inconsistent Privacy Labels Don't Tell Users What They Are Getting
summary: Data privacy labels are a great idea for mobile apps, but the current versions just aren't good enough.

title: Apple Breaks Precedent, Patches DarkSword for iOS 18
summary: Even organizations with users unwilling or unable to adopt iOS 26 can now protect themselves from a severe mobile OS-cracking tool.

title: Blast Radius of TeamPCP Attacks Expands Amid Hacker Infighting
summary: As organizations disclose breaches tied to TeamPCP's supply chain attacks, ShinyHunters and Lapsus$ are getting involved, taking credit, and creating a murky situation for enterprises.

sections.context: This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

email_summary: As organizations disclose breaches tied to TeamPCP's supply chain attacks, ShinyHunters and Lapsus$ are getting involved, taking credit, and creating a murky situation for enterprises. Severity is rated high.
card_summary: As organizations disclose breaches tied to TeamPCP's supply chain attacks, ShinyHunters and Lapsus$ are getting involved, taking credit, and creating a murky situation for enterprises.

title: Picking Up 'Skull Vibrations'? Could Be XR Headset Authentication
summary: "Skull vibration harmonics generated by vital signs" can be used to sign in to VR, AR, and MR headsets, according to emerging research.

title: Chainguard Unveils Factory 2.0 to Automate Hardening the Software Supply Chain

title: CrowdStrike Next-Gen SIEM Can Now Ingest Microsoft Defender Telemetry
